types.name: amendmentList
types.doc: Element amendmentList is used for describing the structure and content of a collection of amendments

types.name: officialGazette
types.doc: Element officialGazette is used for describing the structure and content of an issue of an official gazette

types.name: documentCollection
types.doc: Element documentCollection is used for describing the structure and content of a collection of other documents chosen and combined for any reason whatsoever

types.name: act
types.doc: Element act is used for describing the structure and content of an act

types.name: bill
types.doc: Element bill is used for describing the structure and content of a bill

types.name: debateReport
types.doc: Element debateReport is used for describing the structure and content of a report

types.name: debate
types.doc: Element debate is used for describing the structure and content of a debate record

types.name: statement
types.doc: Element statement is used for describing the structure and content of an official document of a body that may or may not be normative in structure (e.g., statements, resolutions, etc.).

types.name: amendment
types.doc: Element amendment is used for describing the structure and content of an amendment

types.name: judgment
types.doc: Element judgment is used for describing the structure and content of a judgment

types.name: portion
types.doc: Element portion is used for describing the structure and content of an independent portion of a document

types.name: doc
types.doc: Element doc is used for describing the structure and content of any other document that is not included in the list of document explicitly managed by Akoma Ntoso
